response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and cloud-related technologies (Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes), but his background leans more toward full-stack and backend development rather than deep expertise in C++ or large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platforms. His leadership experience is present but not explicitly in a technical leadership role for cloud/DevOps teams. His C++ experience (1+ years) falls short of the 8-year requirement.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems, microservices, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven track record of mentoring and knowledge-sharing (workshops, courses, open-source contributions).
Experience leading and contributing to high-impact, large-scale projects (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz pricing optimization).
concerns: Limited C++ experience (less than 2 years, not meeting the 8-year minimum requirement).
No explicit experience in a technical leadership role for cloud/DevOps engineering teams.
Lacks direct production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs.
